description:
Fragment (last part) of a court bill in the hand of Daniel b. Azarya. (Information from Gil, Palestine, vol. 2, 715, #390) Verso: Arabic document, see separate record. (Information from CUDL.) VMR

T-S 12.42 + T-S 12.157 (PGPID 7161) is a distinct legal document but shares the same Arabic reuse.
description_he: שבר שטר משפטי (חלק אחרון) בכתב דניאל בן עזריה.
